name: configure_stocks
description: Add or update stock configuration for monitoring. Include stock name, symbol, base price, and currency.

name: get_alert_status
description: Get the current alert status for all configured stocks, including whether alerts have been triggered and last check prices.

name: get_stock_config
description: Get the current list of configured stocks for monitoring.

name: get_stock_price
description: Get current price for a specific stock symbol. Supports A-shares (.SS, .SZ), HK stocks (.HK), and US stocks.

symbol.description: Stock symbol (e.g., 600519.SS for Kweichow Moutai, 0700.HK for Tencent, AAPL for Apple)

name: monitor_stocks
description: Monitor all configured stocks and check for price alerts. Uses 2% threshold for first alert and 1% for follow-up alerts within the same day.

name: reset_alerts
description: Reset alert status for stocks. Can reset a specific stock or all stocks.

stock_name.description: Stock name to reset (leave empty to reset all)
